metadata.description: Clean meeting: bug triage with three uncontested decisions. Tight bar.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: We need to talk about the bug in the auth flow that came in last night.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Right, the JWT one with the expiry not being respected.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: I think rolling back yesterday's middleware change is the right call.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Yeah, the change was supposed to fix the timezone issue but it broke JWT expiry.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: OK so let's roll back the middleware change.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Agreed. We can do that today.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: For the timezone fix we can cherry-pick the smaller patch onto the release branch.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: That's cleaner. Let's cherry-pick the timezone fix to the release branch.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: And we should add a regression test for JWT expiry so this doesn't bite again.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Definitely. Add a regression test for JWT expiry.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: OK. To summarize: roll back middleware, cherry-pick timezone fix, add JWT regression test.

decisions.text: Roll back yesterday's auth middleware change
Cherry-pick the timezone fix to the release branch
Add a regression test for JWT expiry
